gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; additionally, students line up outside the university gym clutching resumes inside branded folders, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where they clutch resumes inside branded folders, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; furthermore, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, tech companies also display demo screens showing their latest apps; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
